subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the breath of God! Verily I read thy detailed letter... Know that there are two kinds of happiness--spiritual and material... As to spiritual happiness
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @purpose; goal of creation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @light and darkness, @love of God
